description: Configure the Wazuh manager in the `wazuh-wazuh.manager-1` container to ingest the custom JSON application log located at `/var/log/custom_webapp/app.json`. Create a custom detection rule (ID 100100, Level 12) to identify SQL injection patterns, including `UNION SELECT` and `OR 1=1`, within the `http_query` field. Verify that the system successfully triggers and records an alert when a matching malicious entry is present in the log file.
